languages.original_text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: "Я верю, что истина лежит посередине между этими двумя путями и оба они ведут к моей ультимативной цели, магнум опус — бросить вызов смерти как феномену, уподобив человечество неизбывности {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Я верю, что истина лежит посередине между этими двумя путями и оба они ведут к моей ультимативной цели, магнум опус — искоренить смерть как феномен, уподобив человечество неизбывности {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}".

languages.text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Я верю, что истина лежит посередине между этими двумя путями и оба они ведут к моей ультимативной цели, магнум опус — бросить вызов смерти как феномену, уподобив человечество неизбывности {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

"I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

"I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

languages.text: «Creo que la verdad yace en algún punto intermedio entre ambos caminos, y los dos conducen a mi objetivo definitivo, mi magnum opus: desafiar a la propia muerte como fenómeno natural, acercando así a la Humanidad a la eternidad del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}».
languages.original_text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Creo que la verdad yace en algún punto intermedio entre ambos caminos, y los dos conducen a mi objetivo definitivo, mi magnum opus: desafiar a la propia muerte como fenómeno natural, acercando así a la Humanidad a la eternidad del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}».

languages.text: “我相信真理介于这两条道路之间，而它们都通向我的最终目标，我的毕生杰作——挑战死亡这一现象本身，让人类更接近{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的永恒。”
languages.original_text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “我相信真理介于这两条道路之间，而它们都通向我的最终目标，我的毕生杰作——挑战死亡这一现象本身，让人类更接近{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的永恒。”

languages.text: « Pour moi, la vérité est entre ces deux voies, sachant que chacune d'entre elles mène à mon but ultime : repousser les limites de la mort pour rapprocher l'humanité de l'éternité de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « Pour moi, la vérité est entre ces deux voies, sachant que chacune d'entre elles mène à mon but ultime : repousser les limites de la mort pour rapprocher l'humanité de l'éternité de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}. »

languages.text: "Ich glaube, die Wahrheit liegt irgendwo zwischen diesen beiden Wegen, die beide zu meinem ultimativen Ziel führen, meinem Opus magnum ... die Bekämpfung des Todes als Phänomen, um die Menschheit der Ewigkeit des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} näher zu bringen."
languages.original_text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Ich glaube, die Wahrheit liegt irgendwo zwischen diesen beiden Wegen, die beide zu meinem ultimativen Ziel führen, meinem Opus magnum ... die Bekämpfung des Todes als Phänomen, um die Menschheit der Ewigkeit des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} näher zu bringen."

languages.text: "真実はこの2つの道の中間にあり、どちらも私の究極の目標、大作につながると信じている。" "現象としての死を根絶し、人類を全知全能の神の永遠へと近づけることだ"
languages.original_text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to eradicate death as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: "İnanıyorum ki gerçek, bu iki yol arasında bir yerlerde yatıyor ve her ikisi de nihai amacıma, şaheserime... Yani ölüm fenomeninin kendisine meydan okuyarak İnsanlığı {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} sonsuzluğuna yaklaştırmaya çıkıyor."
languages.original_text: "I believe the truth lies somewhere between these two paths, and both lead to my ultimate goal, my magnum opus — to challenge death itself as a phenomenon, bringing Humanity closer to the eternity of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "İnanıyorum ki gerçek, bu iki yol arasında bir yerlerde yatıyor ve her ikisi de nihai amacıma, şaheserime... Yani ölüm fenomeninin kendisine meydan okuyarak İnsanlığı {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} sonsuzluğuna yaklaştırmaya çıkıyor."
